de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Class SingleThreadedTacletIndex

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.TacletIndex
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.SingleThreadedTacletIndex

  • final class SingleThreadedTacletIndex
extends TacletIndex
    The default taclet index implementation. It executes method matchTaclets(ImmutableList, RuleFilter, PosInOccurrence, Services) in a single thread (the thread invoking the method). Do not create this index directly. Use the TacletIndexKit.createTacletIndex() resp. TacletIndexKit.createTacletIndex(Iterable).
    See Also:
    TacletIndex, TacletIndexKit

      • Fields inherited from class de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.TacletIndex
